---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest an improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Proposal

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Use case

Explain why this is useful.

## Area

- App UI
- Search
- Reader
- Bookshelf or history
- Remote rules
- Build or release
- Documentation

## Notes

Mention any dependency, permission, privacy, or security impact.
